import io

fn lookup(_ k: String) -> Option<Int>
  if k == "one"
    Some(1)
  else if k == "two"
    Some(2)
  else if k == "three"
    Some(3)
  else
    None
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let key = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  match lookup(key)
  when Some(n)
    println("value=#{n}")
  when None
    println("missing")
  end
end
